description.zh: 小伙子，这一次我不能袖手旁观了。我知道你现在正在和那个叫Skier的家伙合作。这个声名狼藉的人追求的是纯粹的利益，这让我非常担心。尤其是关于你所说的“黄色化学物质”的秘密实验，这种物质是非常危险的。因此，我恳求你，能把化学药品的坐标给我吗？没错，我知道你和Skier的交易的所有细节。一样的，我也会支付你一笔可观的报酬。再强调一遍，这一切都是为了我们的民众。
description.en: Young man, I cannot stand aside on this one. I'm aware that you are now working with this so-called Skier. This disreputable man pursues completely lucrative interests and that is a matter of great concern to me. Especially all this story with secret experiments on a substance that you call the yellow chemical. The substance is extremely dangerous, and I have a major request for you, could you give up the coordinates of the chemicals to me? Yes, I'm aware of all the details of your adventures with the Skier. I would come up with good payment for that. Again, this is all just for the sake of our people.
